ground_truth.title: The Hot Room Web Offers - Downtown Indianapolis, Indiana
ground_truth.main_content: Sign up now and save! Limited spaces available in December. Choose your location: Downtown Indianapolis, North Shore, Fishers, Uptown Indianapolis, Bloomington, or Greenwood. The Hot Room offers a 2-week trial for $59 with a Certified Instructor. No risk, no contract, limited time only. The 2-week trial period activates on your first visit. Enter your information to claim your offer: First Name, Last Name, Email, and Phone. By submitting your information you consent to receive marketing/promotional SMS and email messages from The Hot Room.
